question.text: The Annual Global Statement must be issued within:

answer.text: 30 days from the end of the financial year
60 days from the end of the financial year
15 days from the end of the financial year
90 days from the end of the financial year

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The Annual Global Statement must be issued within 30 days from the end of the financial year. **The Trap:** This is an annual requirement separate from the monthly account statements. **Cross-Exam Context:** The Annual Global Statement provides a comprehensive yearly view to the client. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This statement helps clients in their tax filing by providing a yearly summary.
